prs.title: Remove internal css to external file from baseof.html file
prs.body:
PR Title: Moved Inline CSS to External style.css (Fixes #22)
Description:
Refactored inline styles into style.css to improve maintainability, reusability, and performance. This enhances readability, enables caching, and aligns with best practices. Verified UI consistency with no styling issues.

### Probably Adding a README.md in website/ would be convenient.

issues.title: [Docs] Documentation to setup the mahout project locally.
issues.body:
### Description  
There currently isn’t a dedicated guide outlining the setup process for Apache Mahout. A step-by-step guide would be helpful for new contributors and users trying to get started.

Would it be possible to have documentation that covers the following aspects?

Suggested Documentation Scope:
Installation Steps – Setting up Apache Mahout on different operating systems (Windows, Linux, macOS).

Dependencies – List of required dependencies and their installation instructions.

Building from Source – Steps to clone, build, and run Mahout successfully.

Basic Usage – Example commands to validate the installation.



### Additional Context  
If such documentation already exists, linking it more prominently in the README would be helpful. Happy to contribute if needed.
